rationale: The citing paper’s core outcomes include changes in shoppers’ promotion sensitivity and moderation by category healthiness, while the cited paper directly examines promotion format effects (price discount vs. bonus pack) for virtue vs. vice foods and provides a guilt/justification mechanism. This construct overlap (food healthiness × promotion response) makes the cited work a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention, despite having only one matched DOI reference entry.
